goal: Let the community define the baseline autoresearch architecture and later steer tuning changes while every decision and run state is persisted with Filecoin-backed storage.
summary: The community selected a compact baseline architecture, then approved a sliding-window tuning proposal for the next autoresearch run.

findings.title: Initial architecture should be community-approved
findings.detail: The first autoresearch branch should inherit a voted baseline so the autonomous loop starts from a publicly legible design rather than a hidden default.

findings.title: Hyperparameter tuning needs explicit parent lineage
findings.detail: Every tuning proposal should point back to the active architecture direction so later runs can explain which configuration family they belong to.

findings.title: Autoresearch runs should reference the winning proposal
findings.detail: The run record needs a concrete direction identifier so the dashboard can connect votes, code changes, and model outcomes.

governance.description: Registered contributors propose Filecoin-backed research directions and vote on what autoresearch should run next.

proposals.title: Compact GPT baseline for first public run
proposals.author: community:alice
proposals.rationale: Start from a smaller baseline that can complete five-minute runs reliably on macOS before widening the search space.
programDirectives: Optimize for lower val_bpb without increasing complexity unless the gain is clear.

proposals.title: Wider baseline with more capacity
proposals.author: community:bob
proposals.rationale: Use a larger embedding width from the start and accept higher memory use for potentially lower validation loss.
programDirectives: Accept moderate VRAM growth if the improvement is measurable.
Favor direct architecture edits over prompt-only changes.

proposals.title: Extend the short-window pattern after the baseline lands
proposals.author: community:carol
proposals.rationale: Keep the compact architecture but use a broader short-window attention schedule for the next run family.
programDirectives: Keep the compact model shape from the selected bootstrap architecture.
Change the attention window pattern first before altering width or depth.

proposals.title: Lower the matrix learning rate only
proposals.author: community:dave
proposals.rationale: Reduce optimizer aggressiveness while preserving the baseline attention schedule.
programDirectives: Avoid structural changes and isolate the optimizer effect.
Use the same window pattern as the compact bootstrap baseline.

votes.reason: Most reliable starting point for reproducible five-minute experiments.
Potentially stronger model quality is worth testing.
Safer for the first public benchmark.
Best next step after the compact baseline.
Improves context pattern without widening the model.
Optimizer-only changes are easier to attribute.
